output.summary: Fixed team member card CTA positioning by adding flex-1 to content wrapper div

filesModified.purpose: Enable CTA to push to bottom of equal-height cards
changes: Line 32: Added flex-1 to content wrapper div
To: <div class="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-6 p-6">

warnings: Pre-existing webpack size warnings (not related to changes)

syncStatus.notes: PHP template part modification only. No TSX sync needed as this is a shared template part.

testPage.notes: Test page already exists. Fix applies to existing team member cards.

fixesApplied.description: Fix team member card CTA to push to bottom of equal-height cards
fixesApplied.rootCause: In card-team-member.php, the CTA with mt-auto (line 51) is nested inside a content wrapper div (line 32). Without flex-1 on the wrapper, mt-auto only pushes within the wrapper's collapsed height, not to the bottom of the full card. Compare with card-post.php where CTA (line 48) is a direct child of the article flex column, so mt-auto works correctly.
fixesApplied.implementation: Added flex-1 to the content wrapper div at line 32. This makes the wrapper grow to fill remaining space in the article after the image, allowing mt-auto on the nested CTA to correctly push it to the bottom.
flexChainDifference: card-team-member BEFORE: article.flex.flex-col.h-full → (image) → content div (collapsed) → CTA.mt-auto (nested)
card-team-member AFTER: article.flex.flex-col.h-full → (image) → content div.flex-1 (grows) → CTA.mt-auto (nested, now at bottom)
fixesApplied.safetyNote: This is a shared template part but adding flex-1 is safe. In any flex column parent with h-full, flex-1 just makes the child grow to fill available space. It won't break other usages of card-team-member in different contexts.

implementationNotes.structuralDifference: Team member cards have a different structure than post cards. The image is wrapped in a padding div, and all text content is in a separate content wrapper div. This creates an extra nesting level that requires flex-1 to propagate the flex grow behavior.
implementationNotes.whyFlex1Works: In a flex column (article.flex.flex-col.h-full), when one child has flex-1, it grows to take all remaining space after other children's natural sizes. The image div has natural height (aspect ratio), so the content div.flex-1 fills the rest, allowing mt-auto to work on the CTA inside it.
implementationNotes.alternativeApproach: Could have restructured to match card-post (make CTA a direct article child), but that would require more extensive changes to the template and potentially affect spacing/padding. Adding flex-1 is minimal and preserves existing design.
implementationNotes.compatibilityCheck: Verified card-post.php (line 32-46) does NOT have flex-1 on its content div because it doesn't need it - the CTA is a sibling, not nested inside the content div.
